name: Hidden Package #1
description: One of 100 hidden packages scattered across Vice City. Find them all for a special vehicle reward.
acquisition: Behind the lifeguard tower at the south end of Vice Beach. Look for the wooden stairs leading down.
tips: Check behind all beach structures — Rockstar loves hiding packages near tourist spots.

name: Hidden Package #2
description: GTA's classic collectible. Hidden packages have been in every 3D-era GTA and almost always return.
acquisition: On the rooftop of the parking garage near the arena. Take the stairs to the top level.
tips: Use a helicopter to quickly grab rooftop packages. Many are inaccessible on foot.

name: Hidden Package #3
description: Collectible hidden in a cultural landmark area. Little Havana is dense with alleys and backrooms.
acquisition: Inside the abandoned café on Calle Ocho. Break the boarded door to enter.
tips: Listen for the faint humming sound — hidden packages emit an audio cue when you're close.

name: Hidden Package #4
description: Wealthy areas always have well-guarded collectibles. Starfish Island is the richest neighborhood in Vice City.
acquisition: Under the dock behind the mansion with the large pool. Swim around the back.
tips: Starfish Island has guards — come at night when patrols are lighter.

name: Stunt Jump #1
description: Unique stunt jumps require you to launch off a ramp and land in a specific zone. GTA5 had 50 of these.
acquisition: Ramp at the north end of the boardwalk. Hit it at full speed and clear the pier.
tips: Use a fast motorcycle for stunt jumps — they accelerate quicker than cars on short run-ups.

name: Stunt Jump #2
description: One of the harder stunt jumps. Requires precise timing with the drawbridge mechanic.
acquisition: Jump off the raised drawbridge when it opens for a cargo ship. Land on the ship's deck.
tips: Wait at the bridge control booth until a ship approaches — the bridge raises automatically.

name: Stunt Jump #3
description: High-speed jump near the airport. Needs a very fast car to clear the distance.
acquisition: The dirt mound at the end of the airport runway access road. Jump over the security fence.
tips: A fully upgraded sports car is recommended. Anything under 8.0 speed will fall short.

name: Rampage #1
description: Series staple since GTA3. Kill a target number of enemies within a time limit.
acquisition: Destroy 15 vehicles in 2 minutes at the container yard near the cargo cranes.
tips: Use the RPG or grenades — you need area damage to hit the vehicle count. Spawns at the red skull icon.

name: Weapon Pickup
description: Rare weapon spawn that respawns every 48 in-game hours. Worth revisiting.
acquisition: Behind the mansion pool house on the east side of the island. Next to the hedge maze.
tips: Weapon pickups respawn — mark this on your map and revisit whenever you need free RPG ammo.

name: Armor Pickup
description: Free body armor that respawns. Essential checkpoint before difficult missions.
tips: level 3. Northeast corner behind a pillar.
column8: Grab this before every major heist mission — the airport is usually on the way to mission starts.
